title: Pondicherry University Time Table 2026 Out

detail.title: Pondicherry University Time Table 2026 Out
detail.short_info: Pondicherry University has released the Time Table 2026 for UG Arts & Science NEP V & VI Semester and PG Arts & Science January 2026 examinations. Download the official exam schedule PDF at exam.pondiuni.edu.in.

content.text: Pondicherry University has officially released the Time Table 2026 for PG Arts & Science Courses and UG Arts & Science NEP V & VI Semester examinations for January 2026 session. Students can now download the official Pondicherry University Time Table 2026 PDF from the university examination portal and check their respective exam schedules.

rows: V & VI Semester (UG NEP) & PG Courses

sections.heading: Pondicherry University Time Table 2026 Subject Wise

content.text: Pondicherry University has released separate timetables for different programmes. The schedules cover Postgraduate Arts & Science courses and Undergraduate NEP programmes in Arts and Science streams for V and VI semesters.

sections.heading: How to Download Pondicherry University Time Table 2026

content.text: Students can download the Pondicherry University Time Table 2026 from the official examination portal by following the steps given below:

items: Visit the official Pondicherry University examination website.
Navigate to the Time Table or Exam Schedule section.
Look for the links related to PG Arts & Science or UG NEP V & VI Semester January 2026.
Click on your respective course timetable PDF link.
The file will open. Download and save it on your device.
Take a printout for ready reference during exam preparation.

content.text: Note: Always refer to the official Pondicherry University timetable and check all dates and timings carefully before the examinations.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in Pondicherry University Time Table 2026

content.text: The official Pondicherry University Time Table 2026 contains all essential information for students. The key details mentioned in the timetable are:

items: Programme name and semester
Examination date and day
Subject name with paper code
Timing of each examination
Important instructions for candidates
Guidelines regarding exam centre and admit card.

sections.heading: Pondicherry University Time Table 2026 Important Links

items: Official Time Table: Click Here
